spec.expr: 100 * ((sum(last_over_time(claude_code_code_edit_tool_decision_total{organization_id=~"${organization_id:regex}",user_email=~"${user_email:regex}",terminal_type=~"${terminal_type:regex}",tool_name=~"${tool_name:regex}",language=~"${language:regex}",decision="accept"}[$__range])) or on() vector(0)) / clamp_min((sum(last_over_time(claude_code_code_edit_tool_decision_total{organization_id=~"${organization_id:regex}",user_email=~"${user_email:regex}",terminal_type=~"${terminal_type:regex}",tool_name=~"${tool_name:regex}",language=~"${language:regex}"}[$__range])) or on() vector(0)), 1))

spec.description: Accepted Claude edit decisions as a percentage of all Claude edit decisions.
spec.title: Claude Accept Rate

spec.expr: 100 * ((sum(increase(codex_tool_call_total{deployment_environment=~"${deployment_environment:regex}",service_name=~"${service_name:regex}",model=~"${codex_model:regex}",auth_mode=~"${auth_mode:regex}",session_source=~"${session_source:regex}",tool=~"${tool:regex}",success="true"}[$__range])) or on() vector(0)) / clamp_min((sum(increase(codex_tool_call_total{deployment_environment=~"${deployment_environment:regex}",service_name=~"${service_name:regex}",model=~"${codex_model:regex}",auth_mode=~"${auth_mode:regex}",session_source=~"${session_source:regex}",tool=~"${tool:regex}"}[$__range])) or on() vector(0)), 1))

spec.expr: ((histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(codex_tool_call_duration_ms_milliseconds_bucket{deployment_environment=~"${deployment_environment:regex}",service_name=~"${service_name:regex}",model=~"${codex_model:regex}",auth_mode=~"${auth_mode:regex}",session_source=~"${session_source:regex}",tool=~"${tool:regex}"}[5m]))) and on() (sum(rate(codex_tool_call_duration_ms_milliseconds_count{deployment_environment=~"${deployment_environment:regex}",service_name=~"${service_name:regex}",model=~"${codex_model:regex}",auth_mode=~"${auth_mode:regex}",session_source=~"${session_source:regex}",tool=~"${tool:regex}"}[5m])) > 0)) or on() vector(0))

spec.expr: (100 * ((sum(increase(github_copilot_tool_call_count_total{success="true"}[$__rate_interval])) or on() vector(0)) / clamp_min((sum(increase(github_copilot_tool_call_count_total[$__rate_interval])) or on() vector(0)), 1)))

(100 * ((sum(increase(gemini_cli_api_request_count_total{service_name=~"gemini|gemini-cli",status_code=~"2.."}[$__rate_interval])) or on() vector(0)) / clamp_min((sum(increase(gemini_cli_api_request_count_total{service_name=~"gemini|gemini-cli"}[$__rate_interval])) or on() vector(0)), 1)))
